GSBPathy is a science-backed digital therapeutics (DTx) platform dedicated to managing irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). By integrating Ayurveda with modern clinical research, we offer an evidence-based, medicine-free program that combines Ashtanga Yoga, functional exercise, low-FODMAP nutrition, meditation, and behavioral therapy, all enhanced by data-driven personalization. With over 700 paying clients and an 80% symptom relief rate, GSBPathy demonstrates strong traction. We plan to expand into other chronic lifestyle diseases after reaching a $62.5 million revenue milestone in IBS, unlocking broader market opportunities.
